amogh.name: Amogh Jayasimha
amogh.headline: Platform engineer focused on safer release paths, Kubernetes reliability, and infrastructure that holds up under production change.
amogh.shortBio: I build release paths, cluster guardrails, and infrastructure workflows that let teams ship faster without turning production into a gamble.
amogh.longBio: Amogh Jayasimha is a platform and site reliability engineer focused on Kubernetes operations, GitOps delivery, and production hardening. His recent work spans GKE platform ownership, CI acceleration, stateful incident recovery, mTLS rollouts, supply chain policy enforcement, and a chaos-gated promotion pipeline that blocks production until a system survives live fault injection under load.
